title: The future of software engineering, tokenmaxxing and AI in higher education
summary: The Mixture of Experts podcast examines how the role of software engineers is evolving amid AI adoption, discusses tokenmaxxing as companies exhaust AI budgets rapidly, covers NVIDIA's RTX Spark superchip enabling 120-billion-parameter models on personal computers, and explores AI literacy challenges and opportunities in higher education.
